title: LearningPath
description: Output of concept-ordering. A topological introduction order over the dependency graph, grouped into tiers, proving no concept is introduced before the ones it assumes.

primitives.description: Foundational concepts: dependency-DAG roots (in-degree zero), learned first.

tiers.description: Ordered ranks; tier n may assume only concepts in tiers < n.

assumes.description: Direct prerequisites; each must appear in an earlier tier.

rationale.description: The one new idea this concept adds atop its prerequisites.

no_forward_references.description: True when every concept's assumes resolve to a strictly earlier tier.

cycles.description: Concept names in any dependency cycle found; empty when the graph is acyclic.

tie_breaks.description: How ambiguous orderings were resolved (e.g. fewer prerequisites first, then highest out-degree).
